title: schedonorus arundinaceus
intro: Schedonorus arundinaceus, also known as sweet vernal grass or meadow grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Schedonorus arundinaceus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Sweet vernal grass can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
